title: Roasted Tunisian Flat Rice Noodles Wrap
description: A flavorful and comforting wrap featuring roasted vegetables, flat rice noodles, and a hint of Tunisian spices. Perfect for a sick day or a weeknight meal.
instructions: Toss the eggplant, zucchini, red bell pepper, and red onion with olive oil, salt, and black pepper, and spread on a baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and lightly browned.
Cook the flat rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the roasted vegetables, cooked noodles, Tunisian spice blend, and lemon juice.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Warm the ti leaf wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the vegetable and noodle mixture onto the center of each wrap, and fold the bottom half up over the filling.
Roll the wraps up tightly and serve hot.
